fix(f9): fix toHcmDate timezone bug and add missing test coverage

- Fix toHcmDate() to use format(date, 'yyyy-MM-dd') from date-fns instead
  of toISOString().slice(0, 10), which produced wrong dates in UTC+ timezones
- Update approve test suite mock dates to use local-midnight constructors

commit.message:
Initial release: LoadLens v1.0.0 — RPS Load Testing & Capacity Planning Toolkit

Features:
- FastAPI server with CPU/IO/mixed/flaky workload endpoints
- Async load generator with token bucket RPS control
- HDR histogram metrics (P50/P95/P99/P999 latency)
- Rate limiter with backpressure monitoring
- Circuit breaker (closed/open/half-open states)
- Connection pool manager with utilization metrics
- Streamlit real-time dashboard with Plotly charts
- Interactive educational CLI (Why 8 RPS is nothing)
- Little's Law capacity planner
- Docker + docker-compose support
- 86 unit and integration tests (100% passing)

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: LIKE ESCAPE 改用 ! 避免 MariaDB backslash 字串解析錯誤

原 ESCAPE '\' 在 Python 求值後變成 SQL 的 ESCAPE '\'，
MariaDB 將 \' 解析為 escaped quote，造成字串未終止的語法錯誤。
改用 ! 作為 ESCAPE 字元（! 在 SQL 字串中無特殊意義），

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

fix: expense category dropdown defaults to bank card instead of expense account (#10)

The expense category (支出分类) dropdown in the quick entry dialog was using
allAccountOptions() which lists all account types starting with Assets. This
caused Assets:Bank:Checking (银行卡) to appear as the default instead of an
actual expense category like Expenses:Food:Dining.

Changed to use accountOptions(ds, "Expenses") for both the category dropdown
and split bill rows in expense mode, matching the pattern already used for
income mode (which correctly uses Income-only accounts).

commit.message:
feat(research): context-adaptive models & cumulative integral analysis (EXP-1791–1826)

Context-Adaptive Modeling (EXP-1791–1796):
- UAM-aware model is biggest win: R² -6.64 → -3.46 (11/11 improved)
- Hypo recovery nearly solved: R² -7.12 → -0.003
- 89.5% of glucose rises are UAM (no carb entries)
- meal_rise (R²=-44.9) and insulin_fall (R²=-46.1) remain hardest types
- Meal absorption highly variable: CV=60%, mean peak 91±55 min

Cumulative Integral Analysis (EXP-1821–1826):
- Slow features beat raw glucose for 24h prediction (0.220 vs 0.119 bits)
- Demand integral has higher Hurst exponent than supply (1.36 vs 1.24)
- 12h crossover: raw glucose wins short-term, slow features win long-term
- No phase separation in linear models; no low-rank structure at long windows
- Raw cumulative balance uninformative for context prediction

Key production insight: dual-timescale architecture needed:
  Short head (raw glucose+IOB) for 1-6h, slow features for 12-24h

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

Remove apply_ic.py, ic_changes.patch and test_closure.js that were
accidentally included in the RefCell bypass commit.

repository.name: stator
repository.description: Rust implementation for JavaScript engine

commit.message:
perf(maglev): exponential deopt cooldown to prevent retry thrashing

After each Maglev deopt, set a cooldown period of 2^deopt_count
invocations before retrying. This prevents the overhead of repeatedly
entering and immediately deopting Maglev code (e.g. prototype_chain
constructors that always deopt during setup).

With the previous MAX_MAGLEV_DEOPT_RETRIES=10000 and no cooldown,
functions that deopt on every invocation would waste ~500ns per call
in deopt overhead. Now after ~10 deopts the cooldown reaches 1024
invocations, effectively disabling Maglev until warm interpreter
ICs are well-established.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix: 修正 source cleanup 的兩個 race condition / SQL 安全問題

Issue 1 — LIKE 未 escape 底線（SQL injection / 路徑誤匹配）
  目錄名稱含 _ 時（如 /mnt/nas_input/），LIKE 模式中的 _ 等同萬用字元，
  導致 get_tasks_for_source_cleanup() 誤匹配其他不相關路徑。
  修正：在 prefix 中將 \、%、_ 分別 escape，並加上 ESCAPE '\' 子句。

Issue 2 — delete_task 無 status 守衛（TOCTOU race condition）
  get_tasks_for_source_cleanup() 查詢到 delete_task() 執行之間，
  process_daemon 可能已搶先將 pending 任務轉為 processing；
  原 DELETE 無條件刪除會造成 ffmpeg 孤兒程序無法被 stale 清理機制發現。
  修正：DELETE 加上 AND status != 'processing' 守衛，
  並改以 rowcounts[1] 判斷是否真正刪除成功。

新增測試：
  - test_task_claimed_by_process_daemon_not_counted
  - TestGetTasksForSourceCleanupEscape::test_underscore_in_path_is_escaped

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
perf(interpreter): bypass RefCell in DefineNamedOwnProperty template fill

Replace map.borrow_mut().try_template_fill() with unsafe raw pointer
access in all three DefineNamedOwnProperty handlers:
- SMI loop handler
- Non-SMI dispatch loop inline handler
- Table dispatch handler (dispatch.rs)

Each object literal with N properties incurs N RefCell borrow_mut()
checks for template fill. For object_creation_1k (3 properties per
object, 1000 objects), this eliminates ~3000 RefCell runtime checks.

SAFETY: Same single-threaded interpreter guarantee as all other unsafe
bypasses in the interpreter.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
perf(interpreter): bypass RefCell in Array keyed access and push hot paths

Replace RefCell::borrow/borrow_mut with unsafe raw pointer access in the
interpreter's hottest Array paths:

- SMI loop LdaKeyedProperty: use items.as_ptr() + get_unchecked instead
  of items.borrow() + .get().cloned(). Also fast-path Boolean results to
  stay in SMI mode (critical for sieve benchmark).
- SMI loop StaKeyedProperty: use items.as_ptr() instead of Rc::clone +
  borrow_mut, eliminating refcount increment/decrement per store.
- Non-SMI dispatch loop LdaKeyedProperty: same unsafe bypass.
- Non-SMI dispatch loop StaKeyedProperty: same unsafe bypass.
- CallProperty1 array.push: bypass RefCell for both the callee method
  name lookup and the actual array push operation.
- LdaNamedProperty: add inline poly_load_cache check for Array/Function
  receivers, avoiding table dispatch for cached method lookups like
  arr.push.

SAFETY: The interpreter is single-threaded; no concurrent borrows are
possible between the raw deref and the element read/write. This matches
the existing pattern used in dispatch.rs handle_lda_keyed_property and
handle_sta_keyed_property.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix C0: precise replication queue replay with copy LSN boundary

Replace ops_from(1) with ops_from(copy_lsn + 1) for exact replay boundary
matching SF's gap-free build approach. Two changes:

1. Copy LSN tracking: run_build_replica_copy extracts the snapshot LSN
   from collected state items and stores it per-replica in PartitionState
   (copy_lsn_map). The actor reads it at UpdateCatchUpConfiguration and
   replays only ops beyond the copy boundary.

2. Copy stream full consumption: KV service no longer cancels the copy
   drain task when transitioning IdleSecondary → ActiveSecondary. The
   drain completes naturally (sender already dropped), ensuring no copy
   items are lost in the channel.

Three ranges with zero gap (matching SF):
  [0, copy_lsn]             → Copy stream (state snapshot)
  (copy_lsn, highest_lsn]   → Replay from replication queue
  (highest_lsn, ∞)          → Live replication via send_to_all

Correct for both idempotent and non-idempotent operations.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

feat: 自動清理已刪除 source 的輸出檔與任務記錄 (#29)

每次掃描完成後，scan_daemon 會執行 cleanup_deleted_sources()：
- 查詢位於 INPUT_DIRECTORY 下、非 processing 狀態的所有任務
- 若 input_path 已不存在：
  - 若有 output_path 且檔案存在 → 刪除輸出檔
  - 從 DB 移除任務記錄（同時清除 processing_lock）
  - output 刪除失敗時保留 DB 記錄，避免資料不一致
- processing 任務由 stale 清理機制負責，不在此範圍內
- scan_progress 新增 sources_cleaned 統計欄位

TaskRepository 新增：
- get_tasks_for_source_cleanup(input_dir_prefix)
- delete_task(task_id)

測試：tests/test_scan_daemon.py 新增 5 個 TestCleanupDeletedSources 測試

Closes #29

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Update gh-aw to v0.68.0 to fix MCP server blocking (#38089)

## Problem

Agentic workflow review agents (Architecture Review, Security Review,
etc.) were silently failing because Copilot CLI v1.0.22 blocked the
`github` and `safeoutputs` MCP servers at container startup:

```
! 2 MCP servers were blocked by policy: 'github', 'safeoutputs'
```

This caused agents to:
- Fall back to raw `git diff` commands instead of using GitHub API tools
(wasting tokens)
- Be unable to post review comments via
`create_pull_request_review_comment` (tool does not exist)
- Report **success** despite producing zero output (`agent_output.json:
{"items":[]}`)

**Example**: [Architecture Review run
24220062323](https://github.com/Azure/azure-sdk-for-js/actions/runs/24220062323)
on PR #37993 consumed 2.94M tokens across 66 turns but posted zero
review comments.

## Root Cause

Tracked in github/gh-aw#25550 — fixed in gh-aw v0.67.4+.

## Changes

- `github/gh-aw-actions/setup`: v0.67.3 → v0.68.0
- `github/gh-aw/actions/setup`: v0.67.3 → v0.68.0
- `actions/github-script`: v8 → v9.0.0 (SHA-pinned)

commit.message:
perf(interp): inline IC fast path for LdaGlobal/StaGlobal in SMI loop

Add raw-pointer slot access for global variable reads/writes in the
SMI fast loop. On IC hit, LdaGlobal reads directly from GlobalEnv.slots
bypassing RefCell borrow + HashMap lookup. StaGlobal writes directly
to slots with deferred sync_slots_to_vars() flush before function calls
and loop exit.

Also adds GlobalEnv::sync_slots_to_vars() to copy slot values back
into the vars HashMap when leaving the fast path.

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
Fix cross-realm generator prototype chain and error identity

- GeneratorPrototype.__proto__ now correctly links to IteratorPrototype
  (was incorrectly set to Object.prototype, skipping the spec-required
  intermediate link)
- AsyncGeneratorPrototype.__proto__ now links to AsyncIteratorPrototype
- CreateDynamicFunction uses constructor's realm's %GeneratorPrototype%
  for the .prototype property (spec step 23a)
- Forward outer dynamic function's .prototype to inner compiled function
  so create_generator_object uses the correct prototype chain, both for
  main-realm and cross-realm paths
- Cross-realm errors now preserve their original realm's prototype chain
  instead of being converted to parent-realm equivalents, so that
  `err instanceof childRealm.TypeError` works correctly per spec

Fixes cluster 32 (GeneratorFunction/proto-from-ctor-realm-prototype)
and cluster 8 (private-{method,getter,setter}-brand-check cross-realm).

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>

commit.message:
fix(ci): add pyyaml to agent-compliance direct dependencies

The previous commit moved agent-os-kernel from hard to optional
dependency, but pyyaml was pulled in transitively via agent-os-kernel.
Since lint_policy.py requires pyyaml for core functionality, add it
as a direct dependency. Fixes 22 test failures on CI.

commit.message:
fix(maglev): increase deopt retry limit to prevent deep_object regression

The reduction from 1M to 100 retries caused deep_object_access_1k to
regress from ~3µs to 821µs because Maglev deopts during nested object
creation setup and exhausts the limit during criterion warmup. With the
benchmark binary split already preventing cross-contamination, a higher
limit is safe.

commit.message:
fix: use locale-independent date format in Windows build scripts

Windows date /t command returns locale-specific format (e.g., Chinese returns
周五04/10/2026, breaking the token parsing). Switch to PowerShell:
  powershell -Command "Get-Date -Format 'yyyyMMddHHmm'"

This returns ISO 8601 format (yyyyMMddHHmm) independent of system locale.
Fallback to 'unknown' if PowerShell unavailable.

Fixes: cpp_cli.exe --version now shows correct format like '20260410-652a84b'
instead of '周五04101150-652a84b'

Co-authored-by: Copilot <223556219+Copilot@users.noreply.github.com>
